description_long: This is a modern, rectangular wooden cabinet or shelving unit with a light natural wood finish. The front features two main sections: a large vertical panel on the left, likely a door, and an open shelving area on the right with two horizontal shelves. The upper right section appears to be a closed compartment, possibly with a door, distinguished by a smooth, light-colored surface. The sides are flat and unadorned, emphasizing the clean, minimalist design. The back and top surfaces are also finished in the same wood texture, giving the unit a cohesive appearance. This piece is suitable for urban interiors such as offices, lobbies, or residential spaces, providing both concealed storage and open display areas.
description: A modern, light wood cabinet with a large door on the left and open shelves on the right, featuring a minimalist design and smooth surfaces.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cabinet's depth and flat, unadorned wooden surface.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the full wood grain back panel with no visible openings or features.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the cabinet's slim profile and plain wood finish.
description_view_3: Front view revealing a large left door, a closed upper right compartment, and two open shelves below.
